back: The genesis block is the very first block in a blockchain. It is hardcoded into the software of the application that utilizes its blockchain, serving as the foundation upon which all subsequent blocks are built.

front: What is the unique characteristic of a genesis block's 'previous block hash'?
back: The genesis block does not reference a previous block. Its 'previous block hash' field is typically set to all zeros or a similar null value, as there was no block before it.

front: When was the Bitcoin genesis block created, and by whom?
back: The Bitcoin genesis block was created on January 3, 2009, by Satoshi Nakamoto. It is also known as Block 0.

front: What famous message is embedded in the coinbase transaction of the Bitcoin genesis block?
back: The coinbase transaction contains the text: 'The Times 03/Jan/2009 Chancellor on brink of second bailout for banks.' This is widely interpreted as a timestamp and commentary on the traditional financial system's instability.

front: Why is the genesis block's transaction unspendable?
back: The 50 BTC reward from the genesis block's coinbase transaction is not spendable due to a quirk in the code. This is thought to be either a simple oversight by Satoshi Nakamoto or a deliberate action to prevent anyone from ever claiming it.
